---
title: 分页查询
description: /env/pageItem、/env/page
---
import { GET } from '@/components/RequestTag';

## 变量项

<GET>/env/pageItem</GET>

### 请求

<TypeTable
  type={{
    page: {
      description: '指定页数',
      type: 'string',
      default: 1,
    },
    size: {
      description: '指定分页大小数量',
      type: 'string',
      default: 20,
    },
    group_id: {
      description: 'envsGroup 表 id 字段关联记录，为0时则返回普通变量记录，指定则返回目标复合变量的值',
      type: 'string',
      default: 0,
    },
    search: {
      description: '搜索内容过滤，涉及变量名称、用户标签',
      type: 'string',
    },
    enable: {
      description: '变量状态过滤',
      typeDescription: '1 启用，0 禁用',
      type: "string<'0' | '1'>",
    },
    orderBy: {
      description: '指定排序字段',
      type: 'string',
      default: 'sort',
    },
    order: {
      description: '指定排序方式',
      typeDescription: '0 升序，1 降序',
      type: "string<'0' | '1'>",
    },
  }}
/>

### 响应

<TypeTable
  noRequiredMark={true}
  type={{
    data: {
      description: '数据项',
      type: 'object[]',
      required: true,
    },
    page: {
      description: '当前页码',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
    size: {
      description: '每页数据量',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
    total: {
      description: '数据总量',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
  }}
/>

数据项（主要为数据库 `envs` 表字段）

<TypeTable
  noRequiredMark={true}
  type={{
    id: {
      description: '唯一标识',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
    group_id: {
      description: 'envsGroup 表 id 字段关联记录（关联的复合变量(组)唯一标识）',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
    type: {
      description: '变量名称',
      type: 'string',
      required: true,
    },
    tag_list: {
      description: '标签',
      typeDescription: 'label 名称，color 颜色(HEX)',
      type: 'string<{ label: string, color: string }[]>',
      required: true,
    },
    description: {
      description: '描述',
      type: 'string',
      required: true,
    },
    remark: {
      description: '备注',
      type: 'string',
      required: true,
    },
    value: {
      description: '值',
      type: 'string',
      required: true,
    },
    sort: {
      description: '在分页中的位置序号（正整数），默认按照先后顺序递增',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
    enable: {
      description: '状态',
      typeDescription: '1 启用，0 禁用',
      type: 'number<0 | 1>',
      required: true,
    },
  }}
/>

```json title="示例"
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "group_id": 0,
      "type": "TEST1",
      "tag_list": "[{\"label\":\"test\",\"color\":\"#2080f0\"}]",
      "description": "",
      "remark": "",
      "update_time": "2024-05-01 00:00:00",
      "value": "测试1",
      "sort": 0,
      "enable": 1
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "group_id": 0,
      "type": "TEST2",
      "tag_list": "",
      "description": "",
      "remark": "",
      "update_time": "2024-05-01 00:00:01",
      "value": "测试2",
      "sort": 0,
      "enable": 0
    },
    ...
  ],
  "total": 5,
  "page": 1,
  "size": 20
}
```


## 变量组

<GET>/env/page</GET>

### 请求

<TypeTable
  type={{
    page: {
      description: '指定页数',
      type: 'string',
      default: 1,
    },
    size: {
      description: '指定分页大小数量',
      type: 'string',
      default: 20,
    },
    search: {
      description: '搜索内容过滤，涉及变量名称、用户标签',
      type: 'string',
    },
    enable: {
      description: '变量状态过滤',
      typeDescription: '1 启用，0 禁用',
      type: "string<'0' | '1'>",
    },
    orderBy: {
      description: '指定排序字段',
      type: 'string',
      default: 'sort',
    },
    order: {
      description: '指定排序方式',
      typeDescription: '0 升序，1 降序',
      type: "string<'0' | '1'>",
    },
  }}
/>

### 响应

<TypeTable
  noRequiredMark={true}
  type={{
    data: {
      description: '数据项',
      type: 'object[]',
      required: true,
    },
    page: {
      description: '当前页码',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
    size: {
      description: '每页数据量',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
    total: {
      description: '数据总量',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
  }}
/>

数据项（主要为数据库 envsGroup 表记录）

<TypeTable
  noRequiredMark={true}
  type={{
    id: {
      description: '唯一标识',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
    type: {
      description: '变量名称',
      type: 'string',
      required: true,
    },
    description: {
      description: '描述',
      type: 'string',
      required: true,
    },
    tag_list: {
      description: '标签',
      typeDescription: 'label 名称，color 颜色(HEX)',
      type: 'string<{ label: string, color: string }[]>',
      required: true,
    },
    separator: {
      description: '分割字符',
      type: 'string',
      required: true,
    },
    sort: {
      description: '在分页中的位置序号（正整数），默认按照先后顺序递增',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
    enable: {
      description: '状态',
      typeDescription: '1 启用，0 禁用',
      type: 'number<0 | 1>',
      required: true,
    },
    envs: {
      description: '成员（复合变量的值）长度',
      type: 'number',
      required: true,
    },
  }}
/>

```json title="示例"
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "type": "TEST1",
      "description": "",
      "update_time": "2024-05-01 00:00:00",
      "tag_list": "",
      "separator": "",
      "sort": 1,
      "enable": 1,
      "envs": 0
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "type": "TEST2",
      "description": "@",
      "update_time": "2024-05-01 00:00:01",
      "tag_list": "",
      "separator": "",
      "sort": 0,
      "enable": 1,
      "envs": 3
    },
    ...
  ],
  "total": 3,
  "page": 1,
  "size": 20
}
```

默认倒序返回
